name: LinkedIn
description: Professional networking platform API for managing profiles, publishing posts, sharing articles, uploading media, and interacting with organizations. Share content, retrieve member profiles, and manage company page posts on LinkedIn.

capabilities.name: profile_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated member LinkedIn profile.

capabilities.name: profile_email_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the authenticated member email address.

capabilities.name: posts_create_text
capabilities.description: Publish a text-only post to LinkedIn.

capabilities.name: posts_create_article
capabilities.description: Share an article or URL with commentary.

capabilities.name: posts_create_image
capabilities.description: Publish a post with an image attachment.

capabilities.name: posts_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific post by URN.

capabilities.name: images_upload_init
capabilities.description: Initialize an image upload to get an upload URL.

capabilities.name: userinfo_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve user info via OpenID Connect.
